business_name: Cardiology Practice for Sale (Palm Beach County, FL)
naics_description: Offices of Physicians (except Mental Health Specialists)

location.address: Not disclosed — 2,000 sq ft stand-alone building on a major thoroughfare

asking_price_note: Practice only. DealStream listing shows price On Request / Not Disclosed; $495,000 confirmed via the same broker's listing on 1stmedtransitions.com (id=239). Real estate available separately for sale or lease.

financials.metric_type: Annual collections (cash basis); owner's cash flow is SDE inclusive of owner-physician compensation
financials.collections_source: DealStream listing discloses 2023 ($1.3M); 1stmedtransitions.com listing id=239 discloses the full 2021-2024 series

owner_cash_flow_sde.2024: Described as 'strong' — exact figure not disclosed

financials.ebitda_note: No institutional EBITDA disclosed. Owner's cash flow is SDE that bundles the solo cardiologist's clinical compensation. After a market-rate replacement cardiologist (~$588K median private-cardiology comp, MedAxiom 2024), residual EBITDA is near zero or negative. NEEDS BROKER FOLLOW-UP for any add-back schedule.

operations.employees_full_time_note: 1 physician (owner) + 5 staff, per 1stmedtransitions.com listing. FTE/PT split not separately disclosed.
operations.years_in_business_note: Established and owner-operated 30+ years per broker listing
operations.facility: 2,000 sq ft stand-alone building, 4 exam rooms, major-thoroughfare visibility
operations.real_estate: Available for sale or lease, separate from the practice purchase — not included in the $495K ask

transition: Seller will assist a new owner through a 6-12 month transition (longer possible) and hand over the patient base.
data_gaps: Exact 2024 owner cash flow figure — only 'strong' stated
Whether collections series is gross collections or net
Add-back schedule to bridge SDE to EBITDA
